title: Software Engineer
job_description: We are looking for a software engineer to own the technical direction of our backend platform. You will define architecture for new services, coordinate cross-team backend work, mentor engineers, review designs, and drive delivery across multiple service areas. Candidates should have 8+ years of professional software engineering experience, including strong Python and PostgreSQL experience in production systems. Experience designing REST APIs, leading technical initiatives, and setting engineering standards is required. Docker and AWS experience are preferred. This is a fully remote role.
